name: Pelias
description: Pelias — Open-source geocoder supporting OpenStreetMap, OpenAddresses, and Who's On First data sources.

seo.title: Pelias — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: Pelias: Pelias — Open-source geocoder supporting OpenStreetMap, OpenAddresses, and Who's On First data sources.

when_to_use: Self-hosted open-source geocoder on OpenStreetMap data
Address normalization and place search without Google Maps
Geocoding pipeline using OpenAddresses and WOF datasets
Building geocoding microservices for privacy-sensitive apps
Open geocoding API for humanitarian and academic projects

pros: Open-source geocoder with multiple data sources
Self-hostable to avoid Google Places costs
cons: Accuracy varies by region data quality
No commercial SLA unless using a provider
review.verdict: Top open-source geocoder; real commitment to run in production without a hosted provider.
review.best_for: Teams with DevOps capacity avoiding Google geocoding bills
review.not_for: Small teams wanting plug-and-play managed geocoding

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
